channel.title: Marco Ladeira
channel.description: Essays and updates from Marco Ladeira on AI workflows, systems thinking, software engineering, and practical tool design.

item.title: Selected for Fenergo's first AI initiative
item.description: I was selected to work on Fenergo's first AI initiative, bringing MCP tooling and LLM workflows into enterprise financial software.

item.title: The best AI workflow is hybrid
item.description: The workflow that works best for me is not CLI versus MCP versus agents. It is knowing what each one is good at and composing them intentionally.

item.title: AWS ML Specialty and where my AI focus is heading
item.description: Continuing to push toward practical AI systems, stronger boundaries, and production-minded experimentation.

item.title: Software engineering is moving toward systems judgment
item.description: AI is not removing the need for software engineers. It is shifting the center of gravity toward intent, architecture, interfaces, and better judgment.

item.title: First months at Fenergo
item.description: Getting deeper into event-driven systems, CQRS, EventStoreDB, DynamoDB, and the realities of resilient enterprise software.
